- total_budget: '€1745' – complete cost figure; though no detailed line-item breakdown shown, the total matches the sum of provided items (500 + 475 + 80 + 80 + 60 + 550 = 1,745). This suffices as a complete cost breakdown in total.
Therefore, all 7/7 items are included and sufficiently specified per the format.
